name: Lannius Church of God Pickleball
description: Lannius Church of God Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dodd City, TX. There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Savoy City Park
description: Savoy City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Savoy, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Day time play, 7 days a week,  no lights

name: Skyview Pickleball Club
description:
Indoor Courts, Outdoor Surface.

Rain or Shine, Freeze or Fry.

Google Maps is wrong, the facility is located at the west side of Bear Creek.
